content.text:
All tests pass. Both the empty list test (returns 5) and the single plain sword test (returns 105) are now green.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added a single conditional - if items list is empty, total is 0; otherwise 100 (hardcoded sword base). Added to PROCESSING_FEE.
- Result: All tests now pass (2 passing, 43 todo)
- Approach: Minimal implementation - hardcoded the sword base value of 100 since only sword tests are active. No iteration, no item-type lookup, no rune handling - just enough to differentiate empty list from non-empty list with a sword.
